title: Update Settings
description: Configure the TikTok Top Ads Scraper parameters

content.introduction: Configure the scraper parameters to control how TikTok ads are filtered and sorted. These settings determine region, industry, objective, and other filtering criteria.

scraperParams.title: Scraper Parameters
scraperParams.content: Set these parameters in the `params` object:

rows.description: Specify a predetermined region for your search (e.g., `United States`, `France`, `Germany`)
Campaign objective filter: `Conversions`, `Lead Generation`, `Traffic`, `Video Views`, etc.
Ad publication period: `Last 7 days`, `Last 30 days`, `Last 180 days`
Sorting option: `For You`, `Reach`, `CTY`, `2s Views Rate`, `6s Views Rate`

availableRegions.title: Available Regions
availableRegions.content: World, Argentina, Australia, Austria, Bahrain, Belarus, Belgium, Brazil, Cambodia, Canada, Chile, Colombia, Czechia, Denmark, Ecuador, Egypt, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Indonesia, Iraq, Ireland, Israel, Italy, Japan, Jordan, Kazakhstan, Kuwait, Lebanon, Malaysia, Mexico, Morocco, Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, Oman, Pakistan, Peru, Philippines, Poland, Portugal, Qatar, Romania, Saudi Arabia, Singapore, South Africa, South Korea, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Taiwan, Thailand, Turkey, United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States, Uruguay, Vietnam

availableIndustries.title: Available Industries
availableIndustries.content: All industries, App Installs, Apparel & Accessories, Appliances, Apps, Baby, Kids & Maternity, Beauty & Personal Care, Business Services, E-Commerce (Non-app), Education, Financial Services, Food & Beverage, Games, Health, Home Improvement, Household Products, Life Services, News & Entertainment, Pets, Sports & Outdoor, Tech & Electronics, Travel, Vehicle & Transportation

proTips.content: Use `sort_by: Reach` to find ads with the highest audience reach for competitive analysis.
Filter by `like: Top 1~20%` to see only the most engaging ads.
Combining industry and objective filters helps narrow down ads most relevant to your use case.

seo.title: Update Settings - TikTok Top Ads Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Configure the TikTok Top Ads Scraper parameters including region, industry, objective, and sorting options.
